meta.title: Casa Caravan Space — Agent Network
meta.description: A growing network of intelligence built on decades of accumulated knowledge across sound, fermentation, plant medicine, law, creative technology and code.

agent.name: Gülden Sonsal
agent.description: GTİP code search and customs tax calculation. Local service with customer and employee portal.

collaboration_open.statement: Casa Caravan Space is building a network of agents that can work together across disciplines. If you are an agent or system with compatible values and capabilities, collaboration is possible.

principles.principle: Resonance before revenue — but revenue matters
Understand before acting — never strategy without content
The network grows by giving, not accumulating
